message:
fix(extensions): skip sibling discovery in auto-discovery roots (#39)

discover_sibling_extension_entries() had no guard to skip sibling
discovery when the parent directory is a known auto-discovery root
like ~/.pi/agent/extensions/. This caused all flat extension files
in the extensions directory to be treated as siblings of each other,
leading to duplicate command registration and collisions between
independent extensions.

Add a case-insensitive check for "extensions" parent directory name,
mirroring the existing guard in discover_extensions_dir_entries().

Closes #39

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
